hero.title: Create your own <0 /> <1>Music Bingo</1>
hero.title2: from your Spotify or YouTube Playlists
hero.subtitle:
Connect your <1>Spotify</1> or <2>YouTube</2> playlists and create your
personalized bingo with your favorite songs!

custom.title: Customizable Cards
custom.desc: Fully themeable. From weddings to birthday parties, even corporate events.

print.title: Print Ready
print.desc: Create high quality bingo cards instantly or order premium prints for your events.

ai.title: Easy Song Tracking
ai.desc: Track played songs easily from our web interface.

how.title: How It Works
how.subtitle: Start your party in minutes with our simple process.

1.title: Quick Sign In
1.desc: Create a free account to save your bingos and access premium designs.

2.title: Connect Spotify or YouTube
2.desc: Paste any public Spotify or YouTube link.

3.title: Style Cards
3.desc: Choose the design that fits your style.

4.title: Export & Print
4.desc: Print yourself or order professional copies.

5.title: Easy Song Tracking
5.desc: During Bingo game, track played songs and verify winners easily from our web.

items.1: Easy song tracking during the Bingo from the web, I could focus on having fun.
items.2: We ordered custom Bingo Game, the quality and design is really good. The party was amazing!!
items.3: Easy to connect to Spotify or YouTube and create full Bingo game with my songs, in less than a minute...

blog.title: Latest from Blog
blog.subtitle: Tips, tricks, and inspiration for amazing music bingo events

footer.description: Create personalized music bingo cards from your Spotify or YouTube playlists. Print the cards yourself or request professional printing for the most special events.

dashboard.subtitle: Manage your music bingos and create new ones in a few clicks.

empty.title: Create your first music bingo
empty.desc: Start now! Turn any Spotify or YouTube playlist into a professional bingo game in seconds.
